name: Chips Ahoy Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely roll 20 cookies and combine with cookie crumbs and margarine. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan or pie plate.
2. Stand remaining cookies around the edge of the pan or pie plate.
3. Spread 3/4 cup fudge topping over the prepared crust.
4. Freeze for about 15 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, soften 1 quart of ice cream and spread it over the fudge layer.
6. Freeze for about 30 minutes.
7. Scoop remaining ice cream into balls and arrange them over the ice cream layer.
8. Freeze until firm, about 4 hours overnight.
9. To serve, garnish with whipped topping, remaining fudge topping, strawberries or maraschino cherries.
10. Makes 12 servings.
